about_page.title: About Us
about_page.subtitle: Get to know V3ntix and our mission
about_page.story_p1: V3ntix was founded with a clear vision: to bridge the gap between business needs and technology solutions. Led by Dennis Vera, a Business Engineer and Full-Stack Developer, V3ntix brings a unique perspective that combines business strategy with technical excellence.
about_page.story_p2: Based in Cochabamba, Bolivia, we serve clients locally and internationally, delivering custom software solutions that make a real impact on their operations and growth.
about_page.mission_text: To empower businesses through innovative, high-quality software solutions that solve real problems and drive measurable results.
about_page.vision_text: To become the trusted technology partner for businesses seeking to transform and grow through custom software solutions.
about_page.value_1_text: We stay at the forefront of technology, constantly learning and adopting modern tools and practices.
about_page.value_2_text: Every line of code we write meets the highest standards. We believe in doing things right the first time.
about_page.value_3_text: Open communication and honest relationships with our clients are the foundation of our work.
about_page.value_4_text: We are committed to delivering on our promises and exceeding expectations in every project.

services_page.title: Our Services
services_page.subtitle: End-to-end software solutions to drive your business forward

custom_software.title: Custom Software Development
custom_software.description: We build tailor-made software solutions that perfectly fit your unique business processes. From requirements analysis to deployment and maintenance, we cover the entire software development lifecycle.

web_apps.title: Web Applications
web_apps.description: Modern, responsive web applications built with cutting-edge frameworks and technologies. We create fast, secure, and scalable web solutions that work flawlessly across all devices.

mobile_apps.title: Mobile Applications
mobile_apps.description: Native Android applications and cross-platform solutions that deliver exceptional user experiences. We design and develop mobile apps that your users will love.

api_integration.title: API Integration
api_integration.description: Connect your systems with third-party services and build robust APIs that power your applications. We specialize in creating seamless integrations that streamline your workflows.

it_consulting.title: IT Consulting
it_consulting.description: Strategic technology guidance to help your business make informed decisions. We analyze your needs, recommend solutions, and create roadmaps for your digital transformation.

portfolio_page.title: Portfolio
portfolio_page.subtitle: Real projects, real solutions — explore our work

project_1.title: Textile Factory Management System
project_1.description: A full-stack web application for managing textile factory operations, handling trailer logistics, shipment tracking, and production workflows.

project_2.title: Buddy Gym — Fitness Tracker
project_2.description: A comprehensive fitness tracking application with an Android frontend and Django REST API backend. Users can manage exercises by muscle group, log training sessions with weight, sets, and reps, view history with time-period filters, and track performance statistics.

project_3.title: Cochabamba Tourism Guide
project_3.description: A modern tourism guide for the city of Cochabamba, Bolivia. Features the top 10 tourist destinations with image carousels, towns to visit, and a contact form. Fully responsive with auto-playing image galleries.

team_page.title: Meet the Founder
team_page.subtitle: The person behind V3ntix Software Solutions
team_page.name: Dennis Vera Ustariz
team_page.headline: Web Developer | Enthusiast in React, JavaScript & Modern Web Technologies | Passionate About Frontend & Backend
team_page.bio: Motivated and detail-oriented web development enthusiast with a strong interest in front-end technologies such as React and modern web design standards. Passionate about both frontend and backend development. With a background in Business Engineering from Universidad Católica Boliviana, Dennis brings a unique blend of business acumen and technical expertise to every project.
